dso_augment.csv.description: NightCrate editorial DSO augmentation: common-name overrides, non-galaxy surface brightness, curated distances.

sharpless_crossref.csv.description: Maps Sharpless 2 identifiers to existing DSOs from other catalogs (NGC/IC/Messier) to avoid duplicate entries for the same region.

barnard_crossref.csv.description: Barnard crossref placeholder (intentionally empty — see file comment).
